title: Mixed Gooey Japanese Peppers Okonomiyaki
description: Sweet and savory Japanese okonomiyaki dish featuring mixed peppers and candy. Originates from the Kanto region of Japan.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat.
Add sliced mixed peppers and cook for 3-4 minutes or until tender.
Add grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add gluten-free flour and cook for 1-2 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add soy sauce and cook for 1 minute, until combined with the flour mixture.
Add honey and melted butter to the skillet, stirring until combined.
Add chopped cabbage, green onions, and crushed candy canes to the skillet, stirring until combined.
Pour in okonomiyaki sauce and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes, until the sauce is bubbly and slightly caramelized.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the okonomiyaki is golden brown and crispy on the bottom, and gooey on top.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.
